# pi-gateway

> OpenAI-compatible local API on top of [pi.dev](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono). LiteLLM-shape stateless protocol translator that re-exposes every model pi can reach (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Mistral, plus OAuth subscriptions like Claude Pro / ChatGPT Codex / GitHub Copilot / Gemini CLI) via `POST /v1/chat/completions` and `GET /v1/models`.

## Package

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/pi-gateway
- Source: https://github.com/bntvllnt/pi-gateway
- License: MIT

## Install

```bash
# Standalone (no pi required)
pnpm dlx pi-gateway --port 4000

# Pi extension (auto-installed via ~/.pi/agent/settings.json)
# Add "git:git@github.com:bntvllnt/pi-gateway" to the `packages` array
# Then inside pi:  /gateway:start
```

## Endpoints

- `GET  /healthz`               liveness
- `GET  /v1/models`             OpenAI-compat models list (`id: "provider/model-id"`)
- `POST /v1/chat/completions`   stream + non-stream Chat Completions

## Wiring an OpenAI-compat client

Base URL: `http://127.0.0.1:4000/v1` · API key: any non-empty string on loopback.

Works with: Open WebUI, LibreChat, LiteLLM consumers, Cursor (Override OpenAI Base URL), Continue.dev, Cline.

## Architecture (non-goals)

- No pi `AgentSession` is created — pure HTTP frontend.
- No system prompt, tools, or skills are injected by pi-gateway.
- No tool *execution* — tools are forwarded; clients execute and post `role: "tool"` results.
- No conversation state — each request is independent.

## Key docs

- [README](https://github.com/bntvllnt/pi-gateway/blob/main/README.md) — install + usage + wiring examples
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/bntvllnt/pi-gateway/blob/main/CLAUDE.md) — project rules + contract guarantees + security defaults
- [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/bntvllnt/pi-gateway/blob/main/llms-full.txt) — full detail for AI consumption
- [schemas/openresponses.openapi.json](https://github.com/bntvllnt/pi-gateway/blob/main/schemas/openresponses.openapi.json) — pinned OpenAPI spec (openresponses.org v2.3.0)

## Tested with

- gpt-5.4 via `openai-codex` OAuth subscription (ChatGPT Plus/Pro)
- Schema-validated against OpenAI Chat Completions reference + the pinned OpenAPI doc via ajv (see `tests/contract.mjs`)
